title: Bantha (disambiguation)
content:
'''Bantha''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Bantha]]s''', a [[species]] of [[mammal]]s from [[Tatooine]]
**'''[[Dune bantha]]'''
**'''[[Dwarf bantha]]'''

===Food and drink===
*'''[[Bantha blaster]]s''', an [[alcohol]]ic beverage
*'''[[Bantha burger]]s'''
*'''[[Bantha butter]]'''
*'''[[Bantha steak]]s'''
*'''[[Bantha Surprise]]''', a [[stew]]
*'''[[Bantha-blood fizz]]''', a sparkling beverage

===Locations===
*'''[[Bantha Graveyard (Tatooine)|Bantha Graveyard]]''' on Tatooine
*The '''[[Bantha Plains]]''' on Tatooine
*'''[[Bantha Tracks]]''' on [[Batuu]]

*"'''[[Son of a bantha]]"

*"'''[[Wild bantha chase]]'''"

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Creatures===
*'''[[Bantha/Legends|Banthas]]''', a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''[[Bantha tick/Legends|Bantha ticks''']], a type of [[Parasite/Legends|parasite]]

====[[:Category:Bantha subspecies|Bantha subspecies]]====
*'''[[Blue bantha]]s'''
*'''[[Bobtail bantha]]s'''
*'''[[Dune bantha/Legends|Dune banthas''']]
*'''[[Dwarf bantha/Legends|Dwarf banthas''']]
*'''[[Jungle bantha]]s'''
*'''[[Kashyyyk bantha]]s'''
*'''[[Kilian Bantha]]s'''
*'''[[Swamp bantha]]s'''

===Businesses===
*'''[[Bantha Traxx]]''', a [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]] and entertainment complex on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]]
*'''[[BanthaQuik!]]''', a dining establishment on [[Bescane/Legends|Bescane]]
*'''[[The Drunken Bantha]]''', a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]
*The '''[[Laughing Bantha]]''', a cantina on [[Redcap]]
*The '''[[Wandering Bantha Casino]]''' on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*The '''[[Well-Done Bantha]]''', a restaurant in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]

===Food and drink===
*'''[[Bantha blaster/Legends|Bantha blasters]]''', an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage
*'''[[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s''' from [[Biscuit Baron]]
**'''[[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s'''
*'''[[Bantha burger/Legends|Bantha burgers]]'''
*'''[[Bantha butter/Legends|Bantha butter]]'''
*'''[[Bantha rump]]'''
*'''[[Bantha steak/Legends|Bantha steaks]]'''
*'''[[Bantha Steak Soup]]'''
*'''[[Bantha stew]]'''
*'''[[Bantha-blood fizz/Legends|Bantha-blood fizz]]''', a carbonated alcoholic beverage

===Groups===
*The '''[[Bantha Clan]]''', a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] training clan
*'''[[Bantha Squad]]''', a [[training squadron]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[Cadet/Legends|cadets]]
*The '''[[Blue Bantha Tribe]]''', a group of castaways in [[the Scatter]] on [[Iego/Legends|Iego]]
*'''[[Flying Bantha Squadron]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]
*The '''[[Raging Banthas]]''', a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]]
*'''[[Taskforce Bantha]]''', a group led by [[Booster Terrik]] during the [[Battle of Qretu 5]]

===Locations===
====Tatooine====
*'''[[Bantha Burrows]]''', a canyon
*'''[[Bantha Graveyard (Tatooine)/Legends|Bantha Graveyard]]'''
*The '''[[Bantha Plains/Legends|Bantha Plains]]''' in the [[Northern Dune Sea/Legends|Northern Dune Sea]]
*The '''[[Bantha Rock]]''', a rock formation near [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]]
*'''[[Dead Bantha Gulch]]''', a ravine

====Elsewhere====
*The '''[[Bantha Graveyard (Roon)|Bantha Graveyard]]''' on [[Roon/Legends|Roon]]
*The '''[[Black Bantha Nebula/Legends|Black Bantha Nebula]]''' in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]
